description: Superhero Cat Save baby from high Cliff #foryoupage❤️❤️ #for #fyp #catlover #baby #londontiktok #uktiktok #shorts #3danimation #aivideo #iran #warzone #rescue #lifeinuk🇬🇧
prompt_text: A dramatic, fast-paced rescue narrative set in a mountainous cliffside. A blonde woman in a blue shirt and beige skirt is distracted by her phone while her baby walks off a cliff. A white cat in full military gear and backpack performs a daring mountain rescue, repelling from a helicopter and climbing cliffs to save the child. The setting transitions from foggy grey cliffs to a warm, golden sunset as the baby is safely returned to the mother near a medical helicopter.

prompt_data.sceneDescription: A dramatic, fast-paced rescue narrative set in a mountainous cliffside. A blonde woman in a blue shirt and beige skirt is distracted by her phone while her baby walks off a cliff. A white cat in full military gear and backpack performs a daring mountain rescue, repelling from a helicopter and climbing cliffs to save the child. The setting transitions from foggy grey cliffs to a warm, golden sunset as the baby is safely returned to the mother near a medical helicopter.

cinematography.mood: Intense, heroic, and emotional, transitioning from panic to relief.
cinematography.cameraShot: Dynamic mix of wide landscape shots, close-up reaction shots, and tracking action shots with motion blur to emphasize height and speed.

actions: Baby walks off a wet, rocky cliff edge while the mother is looking at her phone.
Baby falls through clouds, screaming, and then hangs precariously from a thin tree branch over a gorge.
A white military cat repels from a green helicopter and climbs a vertical rock face.
The cat soldier rescues the baby from the branch and waves to the departing helicopter.
The cat hands the baby back to the mother in a sunset-lit mountain clearing while a rescue team stands by.
The mother embraces the cat in gratitude.
dialogue: [Sound of baby laughing and then screaming]
[Dramatic action music with intense orchestral swells]
